channel.title: Throwback Thursday on Travis Beckham
channel.description: Recent content in Throwback Thursday on Travis Beckham

item.description: Every Thursday, I'll try to dig up some old work that I find interesting. I'll start with a little racing game I designed and coded in 2005. While at BR, I had the oppurtunity to build many fun little games for McDonalds's. I really loved these projects because they allowed me to do some illustration, design a little, develop the gameplay, and write some rather intense ActionScript.
